paracontent_tesim: The completion of [the copying of] this blessed book occurred during the day on Wednesday 19 in the month of holy Iyār [May] in the Year of Our Father Adam, the best of peace be upon him, [Anno Mundi] 7233 by … Michael a clergyman …
full_text_tesim: Commentary on the Epistles to the Hebrews (Chrysostom)
Commentary on the Epistles to the Hebrews by St. John Chrysostom, in 34 discourses

The completion of [the copying of] this blessed book occurred during the day on Wednesday 19 in the month of holy Iyār [May] in the Year of Our Father Adam, the best of peace be upon him, [Anno Mundi] 7233 by … Michael a clergyman …
و كان نجاز من هذ الكتاب المبارك
